fields.name: groupingCols
fields.title: Grouping Columns
fields.description: Select one or more columns to group the data by. These columns will form the rows in the pivot table, categorizing the data (e.g., by Department or Region).

fields.name: pivotCol
fields.title: Pivot Column
fields.description: Choose the column whose unique values will be turned into new columns in the pivot table (e.g., Location, creating columns like 'New York' and 'New Jersey'). This is required for pivoting.

fields.name: uniqueValues
fields.title: Unique Values
fields.description: Enter a comma-separated list of unique values expected in the Pivot Column (e.g., 'New York,New Jersey'). This is optional but recommended for better performance, as it avoids the need for Spark to calculate distinct values automatically.

fields.name: aggregateCol
fields.title: Aggregate Column
fields.description: Select the column to perform aggregations on (e.g., Salary for summing totals, or Names for concatenating lists). This column provides the values that will be summarized in the pivot table cells.

fields.name: aggregateOperations
fields.title: Aggregate Operation to use
fields.description: Choose one or more aggregation functions to apply to the Aggregate Column. Options include sum (total), avg (average), min, max, count (non-null), count_distinct (unique non-null), concat (join strings), first, last, count_with_nulls (all rows), count_distinct_with_nulls (unique including nulls), percent_row (% of row), percent_col (% of column), total_row (add total row), total_col (add total column).

fields.name: caseInsensitive
fields.title: Case Insensitive Grouping
fields.description: Enable this to make grouping case-insensitive (e.g., 'New York' and 'new york' treated as the same). Default is false, meaning case-sensitive grouping.

fields.name: retainSpecialChars
fields.title: Retain Special Characters
fields.description: If set to true, keep special characters (like #, *, spaces) in the new column names created from pivot values. If false (default), replace them with underscores for cleaner, compatible column names.

fields.name: concatSeparator
fields.title: Concatenation Separator
fields.description: Specify the separator to use when concatenating strings with the 'concat' operation (e.g., ',' or '; '). Only applies if 'concat' is selected in Aggregate Operations. Default is ','.

fields.name: maxConcatLength
fields.title: Field Size (Max Characters)
fields.description: Set the maximum number of characters for concatenated strings. If the result exceeds this length, it will be truncated, and a warning will be logged. Default is 2048.

fields.name: outputColNames
fields.title: Column Names of the Table
fields.description: Specify the names for the output columns. If left empty, names will be inferred automatically from the pivot operation.

fields.name: outputColTypes
fields.title: Column Types of the Table
fields.description: Define the data types for the output columns (e.g., String, Integer). If not provided, types will be inferred.

fields.name: outputColFormats
fields.title: Column Formats
fields.description: Set custom formats for the output columns (e.g., date formats like 'yyyy-MM-dd'). Optional; used for formatting display or output.
